intro: Senior Solution Architect at Slalom. Deep, varied experience across cloud infrastructure, software engineering, and AI / LLM / prompt engineering. I look at problems and design systems to solve them from first principles.

roles.title: Senior Solution Architect
roles.note: A lot of different industries over a lot of years. The common thread: show up, find the load-bearing wrong thing, replace it without stopping the work already in flight.

engagements.title: AI Lead — State Government
bullets: Architected a document-intelligence pipeline on Google Cloud (Vertex AI, Document AI, Cloud Run, Pub/Sub, GCS), enabling the state to handle the influx of forms and documentation under H.R.1 — 119th Congress (2025-2026).
Built a per-field confidence score combining image quality, agreement across intentionally-varied prompts, data-plausibility validation, and model logprobs.
Working end-to-end prototype delivered in 4 weeks; engagement ongoing.

engagements.title: Solution Architect — Cryptocurrency
bullets: Architected an AI-supported migration of thousands of repositories from a corporate GitHub Enterprise installation to GitHub Cloud, meeting data-residency requirements; delivered in 6 months.
Organized, architected, and oversaw TDD AI agents as the human-in-the-loop to produce the migration tooling; downstream client developer review raised minimal additional feedback.
Migrated the company's project-management and developer-experience tooling onto the new platform, partnering directly with GitHub engineering on gaps.

engagements.title: Solution Architect / Technical Lead — Agriculture
bullets: Architected and led a team to implement an asynchronous customer & billing management system, replacing two prior attempts that were failing due to unacceptable performance.
Solution exceeded requirements by an order of magnitude — 3s end-to-end update time vs a 30s requirement.

engagements.title: Solution Architect — Tax
bullets: Architected a data migration for a tax-preparation software company that will result in net savings of greater than $1M USD / yr in direct licensing costs, plus significant reduction in operating expense.

engagements.title: Solution Architect — Insurance
bullets: Architected and managed a team to implement a custom CRM to present insurance sales associates a unified dashboard of their actionable items.
Changed architectures with minimal disruption of ongoing work during the project, in response to changing business requirements.

engagements.title: Solution Architect — Heavy Equipment Manufacturing
bullets: Performed latency and performance analysis across a myriad of Amazon Web Services products, culminating in a change of direction of the organization toward a novel data storage architecture.
Performance analysis uncovered new-to-AWS defects in released services.

roles.title: Application / Cloud / DevOps Architect
bullets: Built a vertical-slice generator (microservice + frontend) — slice setup from weeks to minutes.
Containerized a 20-year-old tax-prep app suite — dev setup from a week+ to hours.
Rescued a two-months-late online-ordering app; re-architected off a global mutable store, shipped on time.
roles.note: Most of what I know about pulling a project out of a hole came from these years.

roles.title: Software Craftsman
bullets: Shipped a checksum-based defense against URL manipulation in a banking app in under six hours.
Cut mobile-app production builds from multi-hour to single-digit minutes.
Parachuted into teams for weeks-to-months as architectural + devops troubleshooter.
roles.note: The parachute-in role taught me to read a codebase the way a doctor reads a chart.

roles.title: Software Craftsman
bullets: Reassembled a ~50k-line app from decompiled binaries + scraps of unversioned code after a server failure.
Android SME on a committee measuring vendor-change risk to in-flight entertainment.
Taught TDD to AA.com developers.
roles.note: Rebuilding from decompiled binaries was the week I stopped taking source control for granted.

certs: Google Cloud Platform — Cloud DevOps Engineer · Professional · AI Leader
Amazon Web Services — Certified DevOps Engineer · Professional · Architect · Professional (historical)
